sections.heading: Wheel Of Chores — Free Spin & Assign Chores Fairly
sections.content: Spin the Wheel Of Chores and assign household tasks fairly in seconds. Free chore wheel generator for kids, adults & roommates. No sign-up needed — try now!

sections.heading: How to Use This Calculator
sections.content: Enter your values in the calculator above and click calculate to see instant results. Adjust inputs to compare scenarios and find the option that fits your needs.
